channel.title: SQL on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in SQL on upyesp

item.title: MySQL, Running SQL Scripts From the Command Line
item.description: MySQL can be accessed from the command line interface (CLI). Here’s how to run SQL scripts from the CLI.

item.title: MySQL and Windows Terminal
item.description: MySQL has it’s own terminal emulator, providing a command-line interface (CLI) for the direct input and execution of SQL commands and scripts.
